ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding model record */,
  "method" TEXT /* Name of the model evaluation method used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_metadata ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fairness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fairness metric record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding evaluation record */,
  "average_abs_odds_difference_gender" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference for gender */,
  "average_abs_odds_difference_race" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference for race */,
  "equal_opportunity_difference_gender" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference for gender */,
  "equal_opportunity_difference_race" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference for race */,
  "disparate_impact_ratio_gender" REAL /* Disparate impact ratio for gender */,
  "disparate_impact_ratio_race" REAL /* Disparate impact ratio for race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fairness metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fairness metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coefficient_of_variation" (
  "cv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coefficient of variation record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding evaluation record */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_gender" REAL /* Coefficient of variation for gender */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_race" REAL /* Coefficient of variation for race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coefficient of variation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coefficient of variation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coefficient_of_variation_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theil_indices" (
  "theil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Theil index record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding evaluation record */,
  "theil_index_gender" REAL /* Theil index for gender */,
  "theil_index_race" REAL /* Theil index for race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Theil index record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Theil index record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theil_indices_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_entropy" (
  "entropy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generalized entropy record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding evaluation record */,
  "generalized_entropy_index_gender" REAL /* Generalized entropy index for gender */,
  "generalized_entropy_index_race" REAL /* Generalized entropy index for race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generalized entropy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generalized entropy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entropy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_entropy_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "true_positive_rates" (
  "tpr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each true positive rate record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding evaluation record */,
  "generalized_true_positive_rate_gender" REAL /* Generalized true positive rate for gender */,
  "generalized_true_positive_rate_race" REAL /* Generalized true positive rate for race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the true positive rate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the true positive rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tpr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_true_positive_rates_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metadata" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model record */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to create the model (e.g., 'full_log', 'full_gbr') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user record */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role record */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding user record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding role record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding user record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding model record */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_metadata ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding user record */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding collaborator record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding model record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_metadata ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_history" (
  "evaluation_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation history record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding model record */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_metadata ("model_id")
)
